name: XPhyto Therapeutics Corp.
summary: XPhyto Therapeutics Corp., through its subsidiaries, operates as a biopharma, diagnostics, and cannabis science company in Canada and Germany. It is involved in the production, cultivation, extraction, isolation, formulation, delivery, and sale of medicinal cannabis. The company also provides contract development and consulting services. XPhyto Therapeutics Corp. has development, technology purchase and license agreement with 3a-Diagnostics GmbH for the development and commercialization of real-time, low-cost and easy-to-use screening tests using 3a's pathogen specific biosensors and XPhyto's oral dissolvable drug delivery platform. XPhyto Therapeutics Corp. was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
